channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US allies rebuff Trump's request for support in Strait of Hormuz

- Roundup: European allies resist Trump's call for military mision in Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Governments remain silent or reject Trump's proposed naval coalition
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Biggest Nato allies reject Trump’s Hormuz armada demand
- European allies refuse US request to help open Strait of Hormuz
- Europe Rejects Trump’s Demands for Warships to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
- Europe Rejects Trump’s Demands for Warships to Reopen the Strait of Hormuz
- UK declines Trump's offer of sending warships to Hormuz
- FirstFT: Trump warns European allies on Nato over Hormuz plea
- Australia declines Trump request for Hormuz mission]]>

item.title: Israeli strikes in south Lebanon kill 10, ministry says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- 2 killed, 17 injured in Israeli airstrikes on S. Lebanon
- Israel’s military strikes on Lebanon leaves nearly 900 killed — Health Ministry
- Death toll from Israeli attacks in Lebanon rises to 886
- At least 7 killed in Israeli airstrikes across southern Lebanon]]>

item.title: Seoul says Hormuz naval deployment needs careful deliberation
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- After Trump’s Call to Send Warships to Strait of Hormuz, Nations Respond With Caution
- After Trump’s Call to Send Warships to Strait of Hormuz, Nations Respond With Caution
- The US is considering Hormuz naval escorts. There are risks and it could go disastrously wrong]]>

item.title: Britain drawn closer to Iran war as Starmer moves to appease Trump
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Starmer distances UK from Iran war as EU leaders rule out sending warships
- UK's Starmer resists being drawn into wider Iran war, offers help on strait
- UK will not be drawn into ‘wider war’ in Middle East, says PM Keir Starmer
- Britain drawn closer to Iran war as a reluctant Starmer moves to appease Trump
- UK will not be drawn into wider war in Middle East, says Keir Starmer
- UK ‘will not be drawn into wider war,’ says Starmer
- UK'S Starmer rules out joining wider Iran war, says reopening Hormuz strait will not be easy
- UK'S Starmer rules out joining wider Iran war, says reopening Hormuz strait will not be easy
- 'Will UK abandon US in Iran War? British PM Keir Starmer holds a press conference | LIVE
- UK'S Starmer rules out joining wider Iran war, says reopening Hormuz strait will not be easy]]>

item.title: Iran arrests hundreds accused of sharing information with adversaries
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran detains over 500 accused of spying for Israel, US: What to know
- Iran arrests 500 accused of giving information to enemies
- Iran arrests hundreds in spy crackdown across several cities
- Iran arrests 500 accused of giving information to enemies, police chief says
- Iran arrests dozens accused of spying for Israel in new internal crackdown
- Iran Arrests 500 Accused of Giving Information to Enemies, Police Chief Says]]>
